description: Meeting preparation briefs from the meeting-prep-brief orchestration. Aggregates the upcoming meetings in a look-ahead window with per-meeting key metadata, top talking points, open items carried over from prior occurrences, and a quick-reference set of links to related PRs, work items, email threads, and Teams conversations. Each scheduler run produces one ActionView entry of this type grouped via groupId.

contentTemplate.label: Status
contentTemplate.description: Optional alert. Use level 'warning' when any dispatched briefer failed, 'info' when there were open items requiring attention, 'success' for clean runs.

contentTemplate.label: Meetings
contentTemplate.description: One row per dispatched meeting. Expected columns: Time, Title, Organizer, Attendees, Open Items, Brief File.

contentTemplate.title: Per-Meeting Briefs
contentTemplate.description: One nested section per meeting that produced a brief.

contentTemplate.label: Top Talking Points
contentTemplate.description: Top 3 suggested talking points pulled from the meeting brief.

contentTemplate.label: Open Items from Last Time
contentTemplate.description: Use level 'info' when prior-occurrence open items exist; omit otherwise.

contentTemplate.label: Open Brief
contentTemplate.description: Link to the markdown brief saved on disk.

contentTemplate.label: Meeting Link
contentTemplate.description: Calendar event webLink so the user can jump straight to the meeting.

contentTemplate.title: Full Brief
contentTemplate.description: Collapsed-by-default section containing the verbatim markdown brief that was saved to disk under briefingsDir. Mirrors the obsidian-friendly note so the user does not need to open the file. Body is injected by the orchestration's inject-full-markdown Script step via the <<FULL_MARKDOWN:<executionId>>> placeholder.

contentTemplate.title: Failed Dispatches
contentTemplate.description: Optional section listing meetings whose briefer child orchestrations failed.

contentTemplate.label: Run Notes
contentTemplate.description: Free-form notes from the orchestration run (e.g. why a meeting was skipped, warnings, transient retries).

expectedActions.label: Open Briefs Folder
expectedActions.description: Open the local Meeting Briefs folder. CLI / shell open of the configured briefingsDir.

expectedActions.label: Dismiss
expectedActions.description: Archive this run summary without further action.
